content: PSR-4 spec: namespace prefix maps to base directory. Prefix MUST end with double backslash (e.g. 'Acme\Log\\'). File path = base_dir + sub_namespace_path + ClassName.php. Example: prefix 'Acme\\Log\\Writer\\' -> dir './lib/' means class Acme\Log\Writer\FileWriter maps to ./lib/FileWriter.php. The prefix is stripped — not present in file path. Sub-namespaces after prefix become subdirectories. A directory is NOT PSR-4 if: it appears in autoload.classmap or autoload.files arrays, or it is a known legacy pattern (classes/, lib/, modules/) without a corresponding psr-4 prefix entry, or src/ exists but has no psr-4 mapping for any prefix.
